sections.title: 🔄 Substitution Log
sections.description: What worked, what didn't — your flavor experiments

items.title: Sweet Potato → Russet Potato
items.description: Actually better! More moisture, sweeter flavor.

items.title: Quickmelt → American Cheddar
items.description: Similar melt, slightly less tangy. Good substitute.

items.title: All-Purpose Cream → Sour Cream
items.description: Not quite the same. Add lemon juice for tang.
